headline: Agilent Taps Cirena To Turn Long RNA Technology Into Genome Editing Growth
summary: Agilent Technologies (NYSE:A) has licensed its long RNA purification technology to Cirena for genome editing applications. The agreement focuses on scalable production of high purity long RNA constructs for use in CRISPR and functional genomics workflows. The development expands Agilent's presence in synthetic RNA tools beyond its existing diagnostics and measurement offerings. Agilent Technologies, trading on the NYSE as NYSE:A, is extending its reach in biotech tools with this licensing...
